description: The Notes module: folders, favorites, tree, block editor, creating/editing note content, or using note tools.
detection_hint: note, notes module, folder, favorite, star, sidebar, tree, breadcrumb, block editor, create note, edit note, append, read note, list notes

injection.system_prompt_fragment: Notes: block editor; markdown in create_note/update_note/append_to_note becomes real blocks. Precise edits: get_note or get_note_outline → insert_blocks, replace_block, delete_blocks, append_to_note. list_notes: optional search; set snippet_search true for block-level hits; match_all for AND keywords; sort newest by default. Tool results are JSON: ok, code, message, data.
